policy.release_blocker_rule: No open P0 or P1 defects may remain at release cut.

defects.title: Frozen API contract drift risk across CLI, OpenAPI, gRPC, and MCP surfaces
defects.resolution: API compatibility manifest and deterministic compatibility suite added.

defects.title: Tenant and audit control gaps in secure-default server deployments
defects.resolution: RBAC defaults, audit export, and key-rotation hardening shipped and validated.

defects.title: Migration parity gap for SQLite, pgvector, and API-first vector database users
defects.resolution: CLI importers and verification workflows now cover SQL and API-first migration paths.

defects.title: Release policy and LTS branch rules were undocumented for v1 cut
defects.resolution: Release policy and RC hardening runbook documented for v1.x support.
